channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil prices rise as U.S. says Strait of Hormuz remains open amid ongoing attacks
item.description: The Pentagon maintains the Strait of Hormuz is open, but shipping threats are rising along with oil prices.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha weakens as it moves off the Gulf coast
item.description: A tropical storm warning covered the area from Mobile, Alabama, to New Orleans, Louisiana.

item.title: Democrats say Social Security email contained misleading information
item.description: Lawmakers accused Commissioner Frank Bisignano of using an agency email to overstate tax savings under the Republicans' OBBBA and insert partisan poli...

item.title: ICE detentions reached highest monthly total in June since crackdown began
item.description: Over 43,000 immigrants were arrested last month as DHS continues less-publicized enforcement surges.
